body.purpose: Form fields, results, description, and supporting copy.

shadows.name: focused-lift
shadows.purpose: Applied dynamically during user focus or modal overlay.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main interactive trigger for starting tools or committing computations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #007bff; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid #007bff; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0056b3; border-color: #0056b3; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Calculator Button
components.description: Grid layout buttons to launch specific calculators.
components.css: .ds-calc-button { width: 100%; display: block; padding: 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 10px; color: #333333; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-calc-button:hover { background: #007bff; color: #ffffff; border-color: #007bff; transform: translateX(5px); }

components.name: Unit Input Group
components.description: Dual control linking a numeric input field with its corresponding SI unit dropdown.
components.css: .ds-form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-label { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: #333333; } .ds-input-wrapper { display: flex; gap: 5px; } .ds-input { flex: 1; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #333333; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #007bff; outline: none; } .ds-select { padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #333333; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Interactive Panel
components.description: Scientific panel containing list of related calculation utilities.
components.html: Solution Preparation
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #fdfdfd; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-panel:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0 0 20px 0; color: #007bff; font-size: 1.3rem; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding-bottom: 15px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-calc-button { width: 100%; display: block; margin: 10px 0; padding: 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 10px; color: #333333; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-calc-button:hover { background: #007bff; color: #ffffff; border-color: #007bff; transform: translateX(5px); }

narrative.overview: CalcuLab replicates the aesthetic clarity and structured layout of a high-quality physical laboratory notebook. The design emphasizes high visual density, clean rectangular lines, and extreme information hierarchy to serve active bench research. Distractions, non-functional embellishments, and over-rounded containers are strictly rejected. Information is bounded by sharp 1px gridlines, mimicking columns of a scientific data sheet, enabling rapid left-to-right eye scanning under harsh overhead fluorescent lab lighting.
keyCharacteristics: High contrast typography for effortless legibility.
Strict 1px gridlines to segment calculations and units.
Highly predictable, non-disruptive transitions for active tools.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Precision Cobalt is used exclusively as an interactive beacon. Under no circumstances should more than 10% of a screen use this accent. If everything stands out, nothing stands out.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Layout elements are perfectly flat at rest. Elevation increases only in response to a direct user action (e.g., hovering or activating a modal).

dos: Do maintain a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 on all input helper labels and placeholders.
Do align the unit selection dropdown perfectly alongside the numeric input.
Do use formatWithSIPrefix() to display results cleanly with scientific notation where appropriate.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or inputs.
Don't use gradient text under any circumstances.
Don't use overly round corners (e.g., card corner radius > 16px).
Don't import or reference code inside /legacy/ to maintain a modern React 19 codebase.
